autosave.error: Couldn't save — will retry on edit

authExtra.pendingBody: We received your activation request. You'll get a notification as soon as an administrator approves it, so you can start field visits and stock tracking.

me.title: My account
me.signOutConfirm: Signing out clears local data on this device. Continue?

entitlements.title: Doctor entitlements
entitlements.note: Credited to each doctor's partner account when their supervision batch is settled.

vaxReminders.title: Vaccination reminders
vaxReminders.empty: Nothing due in the next 7 days.

inventory.lowStock: Items at or below reorder point
inventory.empty: All stock is above its reorder point.

placeholder.title: Under construction
placeholder.body: This screen will be built in milestone {{milestone}}.

override.name: Override permissions
override.desc: Grant or deny individual permissions per user.

write.name: Manage catalog
write.desc: Create, edit, and remove products and services in the catalog.

write.name: Manage customers
write.desc: Create, edit, and remove customers, pets, and ledger entries.

write.name: Medical records
write.desc: Create and edit visits, procedures, prescriptions, follow-ups, vaccinations, and attachments.

write.name: Manage contracts
write.desc: Create and edit draft contracts and supervision batches.

write.name: Issue invoices
write.desc: Issue POS, field, and exam-fee invoices and receipt vouchers.

read.name: View inventory
read.desc: View inventory stock, movements, lots, and alerts (read-only).

manage.name: Manage partnership
manage.desc: Manage partners and partnership profit shares (partnership environments only).

write.name: Manage suppliers
write.desc: Manage suppliers, record purchase invoices, and pay suppliers.

manage.name: Manage doctor-partners
manage.desc: Manage doctor-partners (entitlement payees) and view their balances.

pay.name: Pay doctor-partners
pay.desc: Pay doctor-partners against their entitlement balances.

manage.name: Manage employees
manage.desc: Manage employees (salaries, loans) and view their HR ledger balances.

manage.name: Manage roles
manage.desc: Create custom roles and edit the permissions of any role.

manage.name: Manage operating expenses
manage.desc: Record and manage operating expenses (water, electricity, rent…).

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Central warehouse and field doctors' inventory balances.
inventory.noProducts: No products — add one from the catalog first

lots.title: Lots
lots.dialogDescription: Lots at this location, ordered by earliest expiry (FEFO).

consumables.title: Consumables
consumables.description: Record internal use of consumable stock (gloves, syringes, …).
consumables.noConsumables: No consumables yet — flag a product as consumable in the catalog first

movements.title: Stock movement history
movements.description: An append-only log of every stock change.

load.title: Load stock to a field doctor
load.unloadTitle: Unload stock from a field doctor
load.deltaNote: Recorded as a delta (+/−) movement — both warehouse and vehicle balances move in one transaction, with an idempotency key to prevent duplication.

alerts.title: Inventory alerts
alerts.description: Items low on stock or approaching expiry.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Manage customers, farms and their financial accounts.
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or ID number

pets.title: Pets
pets.empty: No pets registered for this customer
pets.name: Name
pets.transferHint: Choose the customer "{{name}}" will be transferred to.

farms.title: Farms
farms.empty: No farms registered for this customer
farms.name: Farm name

statement.title: Account statement
statement.shareUnavailable: This customer has no phone number to send the statement to.

customers.openingBalanceHint: Balance carried over from before the system launched (optional) — a positive value means the customer owes the clinic.

doctorPartners.title: Doctor partners
doctorPartners.description: Field doctors who earn supervision fees — accounts payable and payments.
doctorPartners.doctorFixed: The linked doctor can't be changed after creation.
doctorPartners.userTaken: This doctor already has a partner record.

employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Employees and monthly salaries — accounts, payments and loans.
employees.name: Full name
employees.userFixed: The linked user account can't be changed after creation.
employees.userTaken: This user is already linked to another employee.

payment.title: Record payment / loan
payment.loanDeductionHint: Withheld from the salary to repay a loan; net cash paid = salary − deduction.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.description: Manage suppliers, purchases and accounts payable.
suppliers.name: Name

statement.title: Account statement
statement.shareUnavailable: This supplier has no phone number to send the statement to.

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.description: Record purchase invoices and receive goods into the warehouse.
purchases.payNowHint: Record a payment against this supplier together with the invoice.
purchases.paymentFailed: Invoice saved, but the payment failed — record it from the supplier's page.

visits.title: Visits
visits.description: In-clinic visits and case medical records.

create.queued: Visit saved locally — it'll sync when you're back online

wizard.batchCoversExam: This visit is under a supervision batch — the exam fee is covered by the supervision fee and is not charged.
wizard.estimateNote: Catalog estimates — the server confirms final prices at issuance.
wizard.doneBody: The visit is saved locally and will sync automatically. Stock and the ledger update when the invoice is processed.
wizard.offlineNote: The visit is saved locally and syncs once you're back online.
wizard.noStock: No items in your field stock.
wizard.noServices: No services in the catalog yet.

detail.lockedHint: This visit is closed — the record is read-only.

actions.completeBody: The visit will be closed and can no longer be edited.
actions.cancelBody: The visit will be cancelled with no charges.

checkupFee.label: Checkup fee
checkupFee.hint: Confirmed at start-of-exam and billed on the invoice (or posted at visit completion). Edit it, or set 0 to waive.
checkupFee.fieldNa: Checkup fee applies to in-clinic visits only.

scheduleFollowUp.action: Schedule a follow-up for this visit
scheduleFollowUp.title: Schedule a follow-up visit
scheduleFollowUp.hint: Books a follow-up appointment for the same customer and pet. Attending it waives the checkup fee once for the origin visit.
scheduleFollowUp.conflictWarning: The doctor has an appointment at {{time}} — this may clash.
scheduleFollowUp.conflictError: That slot is already booked for the doctor. Pick another time.
scheduleFollowUp.queued: Saved locally; it will be sent when back online.

nightStays.title: Night stays & boarding
nightStays.clinicOnly: Night stays are for in-clinic visits only (hospitalised cases).
nightStays.rateHint: Defaults from settings by care type; can be overridden.
nightStays.estimateHint: Estimate so far — finalised on close (checkout-hour rule {{hour}}).
nightStays.closeBody: {{nights}} night(s) totalling {{total}} will be recorded for a check-out now.
nightStays.closed: Night stay closed and charge posted
nightStays.deleteConfirm: This night stay will be deleted.
nightStays.recloseBody: Nights and total are recomputed from the new check-out. The stay isn't billed yet, so no amount is charged now.
nightStays.closeBody2: Records the check-out and counts the nights. Nothing is charged now — the stay bills at POS or when the visit completes.

prescriptions.title: Prescriptions

recurring.hint: Sends a “medication due” alert ahead of each dose.
recurring.leadHint: Leave blank to use the settings default.

prescriptions.billableHint: Adds the medication as a line on the visit's invoice at the selling price (stock was deducted at recording).

followups.title: Daily follow-up
followups.clinicOnly: Daily follow-up is available for in-clinic (hospitalized) visits only.

vaccinations.title: Vaccinations
vaccinations.noStock: No vaccines in your field stock.

files.title: Files & attachments
files.permissionBody: Enable camera or photos permission in the app settings to attach a file.

visits.billedLocked: Billed — backed by an invoice line; it cannot be removed

startExam.title: Start examination
startExam.body: The checkup fee will be applied to this visit and appear on the invoice.
startExam.waivedHint: Free follow-up — the fee is waived for this visit.
startExam.lockedHint: Press “Start examination” to confirm the checkup fee and unlock the clinical record.

vaccinations.title: Vaccinations
vaccinations.description: Vaccination records and the upcoming due schedule

form.noVaccines: No vaccines — add them from the Vaccines tab

calendar.empty: No vaccinations due in this period

vaccines.title: Vaccines
vaccines.description: The vaccine catalog — stock products with cost, selling price and expiry; purchased like any product and billed when administered
vaccines.deleteConfirm: This vaccine will be removed from the catalog. Recorded vaccinations are unaffected.

field.title: Field-visit invoice
field.queuedBody: Saved locally; it'll send when you're back online.

exam.title: Exam-fee invoice
exam.amountHint: Leave blank to use the fee recorded on the visit.
exam.queuedBody: Saved locally; it'll send when you're back online.
exam.failed: Could not issue the exam fee

voucher.title: Receipt voucher
voucher.queuedBody: Saved locally; it'll send when you're back online.
voucher.amountPositive: Enter an amount greater than zero.

statement.title: Account statement
statement.sourceLocal: Offline view (last data on this device)
statement.shareUnavailable: WhatsApp could not be opened on this device.
statement.settlementNote: Note: doctor entitlements only pay out after the customer account closes and all invoices settle.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.conflictWarning: Overlaps an existing {{time}} appointment for this doctor.
appointments.conflictError: This appointment overlaps another for the same doctor — not saved.
appointments.lockedHint: This appointment is closed and can't be edited.
appointments.confirmAttend: Confirm attendance? A clinic visit will be opened for this appointment.
appointments.confirmNoShow: Mark this appointment as a no-show?
appointments.confirmCancel: Cancel this appointment? This can't be undone.

pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.subtitle: Ring up sales, take mixed payments, print, and void

search.placeholder: Search: product name, barcode, or code
search.scanHint: Point the camera at the barcode

batch.pickHint: The invoice is added to the selected batch's settlement (no field visit)
batch.none: No open batches for this customer
batch.onAccount: On-account batch sale — nothing is collected now; it's added to the farm balance when the batch is settled

scan.multiple: This barcode matches {{count}} products — pick one from the list

cart.title: Invoice
cart.empty: Cart is empty — add a product or service from the list
cart.visitLineHint: A visit charge — quantity is edited on the visit; it cannot be removed here
cart.billedHint: Already billed on an earlier invoice — shown for reference, not added to the total

link.visitChargesHint: Visit charges are added to the invoice automatically at issuance, on top of the total shown — don't add them manually
link.noVisitCharges: No unbilled charges for this visit

payment.title: Payment method
payment.walkInMustPay: A walk-in sale must be paid in full (cash or card)

issue.queued: Sale saved locally — it'll post when you're back online
issue.needLines: Add a product or service, or link a visit with charges

voucher.title: Receipt voucher
voucher.subtitle: Record a payment received from a customer
voucher.allClosed: All of this customer's accounts are closed — re-open one to record a payment.

void.title: Void invoice
void.body: This appends a reversing void row + a compensating ledger entry; the original invoice stays untouched. Stock is NOT returned automatically — record a manual return if needed.

park.replaceWarning: Resuming replaces the current cart — park it first to keep it.

visitCharges.confirmHint: These items will be added to the invoice as locked visit lines.

common.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

registrations.title: Registration requests
registrations.description: Review new account requests and approve or reject them.
registrations.approveBody: The account will be activated with its requested role: {{role}}.

users.title: Users
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email
users.permissionsDescription: Overrides layered on top of the role's defaults.
users.selfRoleLocked: You cannot change your own role. Ask another administrator.
users.selfPermissionsLocked: You cannot change your own permissions. Ask another administrator.

settings.title: Settings
settings.centerNameHint: Shown in the header of invoices, receipts, and other printed documents.
settings.remindersHint: When each reminder fires ahead of its due time.

products.title: Products
products.isConsumableHint: Consumed internally (not sold) — tracked on the consumables screen.
products.openingStockHint: Quantity on hand before the system launched (optional) — recorded as the first warehouse lot.
products.openingStockFailed: Product created, but the opening stock couldn't be recorded. You can receive it later from the inventory screen.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Manage roles and their permissions — create custom roles and edit the built-in roles' permissions.
roles.name: Role name
roles.permissionHint: Select the permissions this role grants.

center.selectHint: Your number is registered at more than one center — choose where to sign in.
center.none: No active center is registered for this number.
center.codeHint: Ask your center's admin for the code.
center.codeUnknown: No active center matches this code.

register.title: Create account
register.centerCodeHint: The code your center's admin gave you
register.pending: Your request was submitted — the account awaits admin approval

errors.accountInactive: Account not yet active — awaiting admin approval

session.expiredBanner: Session expired — reconnect to sync your changes. Your data is kept.
session.expiredToast: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
session.suspendedToast: This center has been suspended. Contact the platform administrator.

sync.discardConfirm: Discard this operation for good? This can't be undone.
sync.reviewHint: Operations not yet synced, and conflicts that need your action.
sync.serverWinsHint: The server kept its version; your offline edit to this record was not applied.

pwa.updateBody: Reload to apply the latest updates.
pwa.installTitle: Install the app on your device?

contracts.title: Contracts & batches
contracts.subtitle: Manage field-supervision contracts for poultry and cattle farms
contracts.proposeAmendmentHint: An active contract is read-only on the device. Create a new draft as a proposed amendment — the office activates it.
contracts.editDraftOnly: A contract can only be edited while it is a draft.

lifecycle.activateBody: Activating locks the contract's terms against further field edits.
lifecycle.gateHint: Field visits are always billed at catalog prices.
lifecycle.activatedByYou: Activation will be recorded under your name.
lifecycle.needPermission: You need the contracts.activate permission to activate.
lifecycle.onlineOnly: Activation is available only while online.
lifecycle.discardConfirm: Discard this draft? This can't be undone.

batches.title: Supervision batches
batches.subtitle: Configure supervision cycles and the doctor's entitlement
batches.readOnlyHint: Supervision batches are managed at the office — shown here for reference only.
batches.farmHint: Pick the customer first to list its farms
batches.closeWarning: Closing the batch computes the doctor's entitlement — this can't be undone.

entitlements.title: Doctor entitlements
entitlements.subtitle: Computed automatically when a supervision batch is settled and credited to the doctor's account. This view is read-only.

closeAccount.title: Close customer account
closeAccount.body: The account will be finalized — no new charges can be posted to it. Requires a zero balance. Doctor entitlements are paid at batch settlement (تصفية), not when the account closes.
closeAccount.balanceMustBeZero: Can't close while a balance is outstanding ({{balance}}). Collect the remainder first.
closeAccount.reopenBody: The account will reopen so the customer can be billed again. Already-computed entitlements are unaffected.

closeFarmAccount.title: Close farm account
closeFarmAccount.body: This farm's account will be finalized — no new charges can be posted to it. It does not affect the customer's other farms or direct account. Requires a zero balance. Doctor entitlements are paid at batch settlement (تصفية), not when the account closes.
closeFarmAccount.balanceMustBeZero: Can't close while the farm has an outstanding balance ({{balance}}). Collect the remainder first.
closeFarmAccount.reopenBody: The farm account will reopen so it can be billed again. Already-computed entitlements are unaffected.

contractFarms.title: Covered farms
contractFarms.subtitle: The farms this contract covers (from the same customer). Editable while draft only.
contractFarms.draftOnly: Covered farms can only be edited while the contract is a draft.
contractFarms.selectCustomerFirst: Save the contract first to add farms.
contractFarms.removeConfirm: Remove this farm from the contract?

partners.title: Partners & profit distribution
partners.subtitle: Manage clinic partners and profit-share percentages (partnership environments only).
partners.soloHidden: Profit distribution is available only in partnership environments.
partners.deleteConfirm: Delete partner {{name}}? Their active share will be removed.

shares.title: Profit shares
shares.exceededError: Active shares exceed 100% on some date.

settlement.title: Batch settlement
settlement.subtitle: Re-price medications across the cycle's invoices and add a discount before closing
settlement.noProducts: No medications on this batch's invoices — settling will only close the cycle.
settlement.discountHint: Reduces the farm's debt and enters the doctor's share basis like the exam fee
settlement.negativeBalanceWarning: The balance would go into credit (overpayment) — double-check before continuing.
settlement.confirmBody: The cycle will close, the doctor's share will be computed on the new prices, and its invoices will be frozen. This cannot be undone.
settlement.successHint: Collect via receipt vouchers, then close the farm account to release the doctor's entitlement.
settlement.blockedLedgerClosed: The owner account is closed — re-open it before settling.
settlement.blockedEntitlementFrozen: The doctor's entitlement for this batch is approved/paid — prices can no longer change.

feeHandling.label: Supervision fee handling
feeHandling.addedB: Charged to the farmer at settlement

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: KPIs and operational + financial reports with export

common.noData: No data for the selected period

doctorIncome.title: Doctor income
doctorIncome.subtitle: Visit count, revenue and calculated share per doctor

clinicProfits.title: Clinic profits
clinicProfits.subtitle: Revenue, COGS, net profit (gross margin) and the partner split
clinicProfits.doctorSharesHint: A separate line, not subtracted from net profit
clinicProfits.consumablesHint: Cost of internally-used consumables within the period
clinicProfits.wastageHint: Cost of stock decreases (waste/damage/theft/loss/expiry) within the period
clinicProfits.netProfitHint: Revenue − COGS − operating expenses − consumables − wastage
clinicProfits.owedHint: Total the center owes suppliers, doctor-partners, employees and unpaid expenses (as of now)

profitPerBatch.title: Batch profit
profitPerBatch.subtitle: Cost/revenue and doctor + clinic share for a supervision batch
profitPerBatch.pickPrompt: Select a batch to view its profitability

profitAndLoss.title: Profit & loss
profitAndLoss.subtitle: Simplified income statement for the period (gross margin — no expense ledger)
profitAndLoss.memoNote: Memo lines are not part of gross profit.

sales.title: Sales
sales.subtitle: Money taken in over the period, broken down by payment method

consumables.title: Consumables
consumables.subtitle: Internal-use consumption by product and location, with FEFO cost

inventoryMovement.title: Inventory movement
inventoryMovement.subtitle: Inflows, outflows and balance per (location, product)
inventoryMovement.empty: No inventory movement in the period

fieldVisits.title: Field visits
fieldVisits.subtitle: Field-visit log with services and medications
fieldVisits.empty: No field visits in the period

farmAccount.title: Farm account
farmAccount.subtitle: The customer's full ledger statement
farmAccount.pickPrompt: Select a customer to view their statement

vaccinations.title: Upcoming vaccinations
vaccinations.subtitle: Vaccinations due within the selected date range

myIncome.title: My income
myIncome.subtitle: Your visits, revenue and calculated entitlements
myIncome.empty: No income data for you in the period

pharmacyProfit.title: Pharmacy profit
pharmacyProfit.subtitle: Drug/product revenue, cost and gross margin per product
pharmacyProfit.reconcileHint: Cost matches the clinic-profits COGS over the same period
pharmacyProfit.empty: No pharmacy sales in the period

inClinicVisitProfit.title: In-clinic visit profit
inClinicVisitProfit.subtitle: Revenue, COGS and gross margin per in-clinic visit
inClinicVisitProfit.empty: No in-clinic visits in the period

fieldVisitProfit.title: Field visit profit
fieldVisitProfit.subtitle: Revenue, COGS and gross margin per field visit
fieldVisitProfit.empty: No field visits in the period

apiErrors.account_inactive: This account is still pending administrator approval.
apiErrors.account_not_settled: Cannot close the account before the balance is settled in full — partial payments do not release doctor entitlements.
apiErrors.appointment_conflict: The doctor already has an overlapping appointment in this slot.
apiErrors.appointment_id_collision: An appointment with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.appointment_incomplete: An appointment needs a customer and a doctor before it can be attended.
apiErrors.assigned_doctor_forbidden: Field doctors may only assign customers to themselves.
apiErrors.batch_already_settled: This batch already has a settlement.
apiErrors.batch_id_collision: A batch with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.batch_settled: The batch has been settled — its invoices are frozen. Correct via a manual ledger adjustment.
apiErrors.billable_in_clinic_only: Only in-clinic prescriptions carry the billable toggle.
apiErrors.cannot_change_own_role: You cannot change your own role. Ask another administrator to do it.
apiErrors.cannot_modify_own_permissions: You cannot change your own permissions. Ask another administrator to do it.
apiErrors.cannot_void_void_row: A void row cannot itself be voided.
apiErrors.care_charge_concurrently_billed: A checkup-fee or night-stay charge on this invoice was just billed elsewhere (visit completion or another till) — reload the visit and retry.
apiErrors.checkup_fee_already_billed: The checkup fee is already billed (invoice line or completion backstop).
apiErrors.checkup_fee_billed: The checkup fee is billed and can no longer be changed.
apiErrors.checkup_fee_not_applicable: The visit carries no chargeable checkup fee.
apiErrors.checkup_fee_not_started: The checkup fee becomes chargeable once the examination starts.
apiErrors.checkup_fee_service_mismatch: A checkup-fee line bills the system checkup service; omit the service or send the matching one.
apiErrors.checkup_fee_visit_mismatch: A checkup-fee line must back-link the invoice's own visit.
apiErrors.concurrency_conflict: The record was modified by another user at the same time — try again.
apiErrors.contract_farm_customer_mismatch: The farm belongs to a different customer than the contract.
apiErrors.contract_farm_exists: This farm is already attached to the contract.
apiErrors.contract_farm_id_collision: A contract farm with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.contract_id_collision: A contract with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.contract_medication_price_already_exists: This contract medication price already exists.
apiErrors.contract_medication_price_exists: This product already has a contract price — edit the existing one.
apiErrors.contract_medication_price_id_collision: A contract medication price with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.contract_not_draft: Only draft contracts can be edited.
apiErrors.contract_server_authoritative: The contract is activated on the server and locked — re-pull the authoritative copy.
apiErrors.customer_id_collision: A customer with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.customer_phone_taken: A customer with this phone number already exists.
apiErrors.daily_follow_up_id_collision: A daily follow-up with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.discount_exceeds_subtotal: The invoice discount exceeds the subtotal.
apiErrors.doctor_partner_id_collision: A doctor-partner with this id already exists.
apiErrors.doctor_partner_ledger_closed: Cannot append to a closed doctor-partner ledger. Create an adjustment entry instead.
apiErrors.doctor_partner_missing: The batch's responsible doctor is not a registered doctor-partner; create one before settling.
apiErrors.doctor_partner_payment_id_collision: A doctor-partner payment with this id already exists.
apiErrors.doctor_partner_user_taken: This doctor already has a partner record.
apiErrors.employee_id_collision: An employee with this id already exists.
apiErrors.employee_ledger_closed: Cannot append to a closed employee ledger. Create an adjustment entry instead.
apiErrors.employee_payment_id_collision: An employee payment with this id already exists.
apiErrors.employee_user_taken: This user is already linked to another employee.
apiErrors.entitlement_already_credited: This batch entitlement has already been credited to the doctor-partner ledger.
apiErrors.entitlement_already_paid: A paid entitlement cannot be re-approved.
apiErrors.entitlement_not_approved: Approve the entitlement before paying it.
apiErrors.entitlement_system_unset: No entitlement system is set for this batch.
apiErrors.environment_code_taken: This center code is already taken.
apiErrors.environment_required: A center context is required to sync.
apiErrors.exam_fee_covered_by_batch: This visit belongs to a batch; the exam fee is covered by the batch supervision fee.
apiErrors.farm_customer_mismatch: The farm does not belong to this customer.
apiErrors.farm_id_collision: A farm with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.field_inventory_forbidden: Field doctors may only move stock in their own field inventory.
apiErrors.follow_up_clinic_only: Daily follow-ups are for in-clinic hospitalized cases only.
apiErrors.idempotency_key_invalid: The idempotency key is not valid.
apiErrors.idempotency_key_required: This operation requires an idempotency key.
apiErrors.invalid_appointment_status: The appointment status is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_batch_status: The batch status is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_contract_status: The contract status is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_contract_transition: This contract status transition is not allowed.
apiErrors.invalid_customer_type: The customer type is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_effect: The permission effect must be grant or deny.
apiErrors.invalid_entitlement_status: The entitlement status is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_farm_kind: The farm kind is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_format: The export format is not supported.
apiErrors.invalid_invoice_number: The invoice number is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_invoice_status: The invoice status is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_item_target: An invoice line must reference exactly one product or service.
apiErrors.invalid_ledger_status: The ledger status is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_location: The inventory movement location is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_location_type: The location type is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_movement_type: The movement type is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_next_due_date: The next due date must be on or after the date given.
apiErrors.invalid_payload: The request payload is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_payment_amount: The payment amount must be greater than zero.
apiErrors.invalid_period: The period is not valid — it starts after it ends.
apiErrors.invalid_pet_sex: The pet sex is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_refresh_token: The session has expired — sign in again.
apiErrors.invalid_reminder_schedule: The schedule end must be on or after its start.
apiErrors.invalid_status_transition: This status transition is not allowed.
apiErrors.invalid_upload_status: The upload status is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_visit_number: The visit number is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_visit_status: The visit status is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_visit_type: The visit type is not valid.
apiErrors.invalid_voucher_amount: The voucher amount must be greater than zero.
apiErrors.invoice_already_exists: This invoice already exists — invoices are append-only.
apiErrors.invoice_has_no_lines: Nothing to bill: no line items and no unbilled visit charges.
apiErrors.invoice_id_collision: An invoice with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.invoice_number_prefix_mismatch: The invoice number prefix does not match the user's prefix.
apiErrors.invoice_number_taken: The invoice number is already in use.
apiErrors.invoice_totals_mismatch: The invoice total does not match its lines.
apiErrors.ledger_closed: Cannot append to a closed ledger — re-open the account or create an adjustment entry.
apiErrors.ledger_missing: The batch has no owner ledger to settle against.
apiErrors.line_backlink_requires_visit: A visit-charge line requires the invoice to be linked to its visit.
apiErrors.line_discount_exceeds_total: A line discount cannot exceed the line's amount.
apiErrors.line_total_mismatch: The line total must equal quantity × unit price − discount.
apiErrors.loan_deduction_exceeds_salary: The loan deduction cannot exceed the salary being paid.
apiErrors.missing_client_id: The operation requires a client-generated id.
apiErrors.missing_permission: You do not have the required permission for this operation.
apiErrors.negative_stock: The movement would drive stock negative — the requested quantity exceeds what is available.
apiErrors.network_error: Could not reach the server — check your connection.
apiErrors.night_stay_already_billed: The night stay is already billed (invoice line or completion backstop).
apiErrors.night_stay_billed: The night stay is billed and can no longer be changed or removed.
apiErrors.night_stay_clinic_only: Night stays are for in-clinic hospitalized cases only.
apiErrors.night_stay_close_online_only: Night stays close online only — the charge posts immediately.
apiErrors.night_stay_closed: A closed (charged) night stay cannot be changed — post a ledger adjustment instead.
apiErrors.night_stay_id_collision: A night stay with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.night_stay_not_in_visit: The night stay does not belong to this visit.
apiErrors.night_stay_nothing_to_bill: The night stay counts zero nights — there is nothing to bill.
apiErrors.night_stay_open: An open night stay has no nights to bill yet — close it first.
apiErrors.night_stay_service_mismatch: A night-stay line bills the system night-stay service; omit the service or send the matching one.
apiErrors.no_field_inventory: The visit's field doctor has no field inventory to deduct from.
apiErrors.no_warehouse: No warehouse exists in this environment.
apiErrors.not_found: The requested item was not found.
apiErrors.number_prefix_exhausted: Could not allocate a unique numbering prefix — contact the administrator.
apiErrors.operating_expense_id_collision: An expense with this id already exists.
apiErrors.owner_ledger_closed: The owner account is closed. Re-open it before settling the batch.
apiErrors.partner_id_collision: A partner with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.partnership_share_id_collision: A partnership share with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.pet_customer_mismatch: The pet does not belong to this customer.
apiErrors.pet_id_collision: A pet with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.pet_transfer_same_owner: The target customer is the current owner — nothing to transfer.
apiErrors.phone_in_use: An account with this phone number already exists.
apiErrors.platform_admin_required: A platform administrator token is required.
apiErrors.prescription_billed: This prescription is billed — it can no longer be removed from the visit.
apiErrors.prescription_id_collision: A prescription with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.prescription_not_billable: Only dispensed-to-owner or billable in-clinic prescriptions can be billed as invoice lines.
apiErrors.prescription_not_in_visit: The prescription does not belong to this visit.
apiErrors.prescription_product_mismatch: The line's product must match the prescription's product.
apiErrors.procedure_billed: This procedure is billed — it can no longer be removed or re-priced.
apiErrors.procedure_id_collision: A procedure with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.procedure_not_in_visit: The procedure does not belong to this visit.
apiErrors.procedure_service_mismatch: The line's service must match the procedure's billable service.
apiErrors.product_barcode_taken: A product with this barcode already exists.
apiErrors.product_id_collision: A product with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.product_not_consumable: Only a product flagged as consumable can be consumed; use a stock adjustment for other write-offs.
apiErrors.product_not_vaccine: A vaccination must link a product of category 'vaccine'.
apiErrors.purchase_invoice_id_collision: A purchase invoice with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.rate_limited: Too many requests — wait a moment and try again.
apiErrors.receipt_voucher_already_exists: This receipt voucher already exists — vouchers are append-only.
apiErrors.receipt_voucher_id_collision: A receipt voucher with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.registration_already_reviewed: The registration request was already reviewed.
apiErrors.role_in_use: Cannot delete a role that is still assigned to users.
apiErrors.role_not_seeded: The role is not seeded in this environment.
apiErrors.role_protected: The admin role cannot be modified.
apiErrors.service_id_collision: A service with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.settlement_locked: The customer account is not closed — a doctor entitlement cannot be approved or paid until the account is settled in full and closed.
apiErrors.settlement_no_basis: The batch has no effective invoices — there is nothing to re-price or discount.
apiErrors.settlement_unknown_product: This product has no effective invoice lines on this batch — reload the preview.
apiErrors.statement_invalid_window: The date range is not valid.
apiErrors.supplier_id_collision: A supplier with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.supplier_ledger_closed: Cannot append to a closed supplier ledger — create an adjustment entry instead.
apiErrors.supplier_payment_id_collision: A supplier payment with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.unauthenticated: Not signed in — sign in first.
apiErrors.unique_violation: A record with the same unique value already exists.
apiErrors.use_attend_endpoint: Mark attendance from the appointments screen so a clinic visit is opened.
apiErrors.use_dedicated_endpoint: Use the dedicated close action instead of editing directly.
apiErrors.vaccination_already_billed: The vaccination is already billed on an invoice.
apiErrors.vaccination_billed: The vaccination is billed on an invoice and can no longer be removed or re-priced.
apiErrors.vaccination_id_collision: A vaccination with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.vaccination_not_in_visit: The vaccination does not belong to this visit.
apiErrors.vaccination_product_immutable: A vaccination's vaccine cannot be changed after recording (stock already moved); delete and re-record.
apiErrors.vaccination_product_mismatch: The line's product must match the vaccination's catalog vaccine.
apiErrors.vaccination_recipient_required: A vaccination must target a pet or a customer (farm group).
apiErrors.validation_failed: Some fields are not valid — review the form.
apiErrors.visit_id_collision: A visit with the same id already exists.
apiErrors.visit_locked: The visit is closed and cannot be edited.
apiErrors.visit_number_prefix_mismatch: The visit number prefix does not match the user's prefix.
apiErrors.visit_number_taken: The visit number is already in use.
apiErrors.visit_server_authoritative: The visit is closed on the server and cannot be changed — re-pull the authoritative copy.
apiErrors.warehouse_id_required: Multiple warehouses exist — specify the warehouse.

tenants.title: Centers
tenants.description: Provision and manage the centers on the platform.

detail.suspendConfirmBody: All users of “{{name}}” will be locked out immediately. You can reactivate later.
detail.reactivateConfirmBody: Users of “{{name}}” will be able to sign in again.

provision.title: Provision a center
provision.description: Create a new center and its first administrator.
provision.codeFormat: Code must be letters, digits and dashes only (no spaces).

operatingExpenses.title: Operating expenses
operatingExpenses.description: Operating costs (water, electricity, rent…) — subtracted from the center's net profit.
